case_title: WALLY, STEPHEN VS LAMBOY, MARC et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBOY, MARC
